manufacturer_from_details: ‎ Shenzhen PSG Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
features: Protective Case for iPad 9.7 Inch: This case with Pencil Holder is compatible with iPad 6th Generation 2018/ iPad 5th Generation 2017 (Model Number: A1822 / A1823 / A1954/ A1893), not suitable for other iPad models

Case with Pencil Holder: This iPad 6th Generation Case / iPad 5th generation case 9.7 inches has an integrated pen holder on the left side to ensure that your pencil is always safely and conveniently stored. Whether you are at work or on the go, you can easily use your pencil to prevent loss (pencil not included in the product)

Automatic Wake/Sleep: The protective case has an automatic sleep-wake function, which automatically wakes up or puts your 9.7-inch iPad to sleep when you open or close the cover, extending the standby time. It is a soft silicone case for your iPad 6/iPad 5

Comfortable Use Angle: Two use angles, by folding the cover of the protective case counterclockwise, whether it is typing or watching a movie, it can make your iPad 6th generation/5th generation stand stably in various scenes, bringing you a comfortable viewing and typing experience

Comprehensive Protection: The protective case adopts a precise cutting design, which can easily access all ports and buttons. Whether you are using the 6th generation iPad 2018 or the 5th generation 2017 iPad, this soft silicone protective case effectively reduces the damage caused by accidental impact
description: From the brand Previous page aoub was established in 2014, specialising in the production of high-quality tablet cases and delivering exceptional after-sales service. To date, we have served over six million customers worldwide. Product quality remains our cornerstone. We are steadfastly committed to innovation and reliability, continually striving to enhance your comfort and convenience in daily life.
